description: Internal claim registry for Hoax.ai self-application discipline. Does not certify truth.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai is not a truth machine.
claims.notes: Core governance boundary. Conceptual thesis framing reinforced by governance files and public surface.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai classifies evidence posture, not truth verdicts.
claims.notes: Extends DEC-001 and DEC-002. Bounded classification only.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai classifies evidence artifacts, not connected subjects.
claims.notes: Artifact–Subject Separation Doctrine. Evidence risk on artifacts does not transfer to persons or institutions.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai follows GitHub-first execution.
claims.notes: Public foundation built on GitHub before DNS or Cloudflare connection.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai uses governance files and a decision log.
claims.support_location: Repository root governance files, DECISION_LOG.md (DEC-009 through DEC-012)
claims.notes: Nine governance files plus decision log through DEC-012. Sprint audits on record.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has a public thesis surface.
claims.notes: Static thesis surface only. No classifier, upload, or tool deployed.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Evidence Posture Standard v1.
claims.notes: Internal governed standard. Not a public product, classifier, or service output.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Evidence Posture Classification Protocol v1.
claims.notes: Governed internal protocol. Maturity not_public_tool. Not an active classifier or public service.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Output Boundary Schema v1.
claims.notes: Governed internal output schema. Maturity not_public_tool. Not an active engine or public service.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Internal Engine Model v0.
claims.notes: Governed internal engine model. Maturity not_public_tool. Not an active engine, classifier, or public service.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Adversarial Enforcement Harness v1.
claims.notes: Governed internal enforcement harness. Not a public tool or classifier.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Interface Embodiment Governance v1.
claims.notes: Governed internal interface standard. Not a public tool or classifier.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Security and Privacy Boundary v1.
claims.notes: Zero-data static foundation. No forms, uploads, analytics, or external scripts.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Link and Route Integrity Hardening v1.
claims.notes: Pre-expansion route/link hardening. No new routes or SEO expansion.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Claim and Source Traceability Hardening v1.
claims.notes: Pre-reference-expansion traceability hardening. No external factual claims.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Technical Quality Gate Hardening v1.
claims.notes: Pre-expansion static technical quality gate. No public expansion.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Reference Page Blueprint and Expansion Gate v1.
claims.notes: Pre-reference-expansion blueprint gate. No public pages or routes added.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Automation Governance and CI Quality Gate v1.
claims.notes: Validation-only automation gate. No deployment or CI write permissions.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Governed Publisher Control Plane v1.
claims.notes: Publisher blocked until content quality standard. No drafts or public pages.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Content Quality and Reference Substance Standard v1.
claims.notes: Pre-publication substance standard. Publisher remains blocked until dry-run harness.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Structured Data and Semantic SEO Governance v1.
claims.notes: Pre-publication semantic SEO governance. No routes, drafts, or deployment authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Publisher Dry-Run Harness v1.
claims.notes: Dry-run harness only. No candidates, drafts, routes, or publication authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted First Reference Candidate Pack v1.
claims.notes: Eight internal candidates registered. No drafts, routes, pages, or publication authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Reference Candidate Evaluation and Prioritization v1.
claims.notes: Eight candidates evaluated. No drafts, routes, pages, or publication authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Internal Draft Blueprint Governance v1.
claims.notes: Draft blueprint governance defined. No draft files, routes, pages, or publication authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted First Internal Draft Blueprint Pack v1.
claims.notes: Four blueprint records created. No draft prose, draft files, routes, pages, or publication authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted First Internal Draft Pack v1.
claims.notes: Two internal draft files created. No routes, pages, sitemap expansion, public metadata, or publication authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Internal Draft Review and Refinement v1.
claims.notes: Two internal drafts reviewed and refined. No routes, pages, sitemap expansion, public metadata, or publication authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Route Readiness Gate v1.
claims.notes: Two inactive route candidates recorded. No routes, pages, sitemap expansion, public metadata, or publication authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted First Controlled Public Reference Pilot v1.
claims.notes: Two controlled public reference pages created. Broader publication, engine, classifier, and tool remain blocked.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Reference Validation and Live Surface Audit v1.
claims.notes: Controlled reference pilot live surface validated. Broader publication, engine, classifier, and tool remain blocked.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Category Language Layer v1.
claims.notes: One public language route created. Engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, and broader publication remain blocked.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Category Language Validation and Surface Audit v1.
claims.notes: Public category language layer validated. Engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, and broader publication remain blocked.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Evidence Posture Workbench Governance v1.
claims.notes: Workbench governance defined. No interface, engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or public prototype created.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Evidence Posture Workbench Dry-Run Harness v1.
claims.notes: Dry-run harness defined. No interface, engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or public prototype created.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Evidence Posture Workbench Specification Layer v1.
claims.notes: Specification layer defined. No interface, prototype, engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or public route created.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Evidence Posture Workbench Interface Blueprint Governance v1.
claims.notes: Interface blueprint governance defined. No interface, prototype, engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or public route created.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Evidence Posture Workbench Interface Blueprint Validation v1.
claims.notes: Interface blueprint validation complete. Conceptual identity validated with maturity boundary. No interface, prototype, engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or public route created.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Non-Public Static Workbench Prototype Governance v1.
claims.notes: Prototype governance defined. Allowed future location defined but not created. No prototype files, interface, engine, classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or public route created.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Non-Public Static Workbench Prototype v1.
claims.notes: Static internal prototype v1 created. Non-public web surface. No public route, sitemap entry, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public tool created.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Non-Public Static Workbench Prototype Validation v1.
claims.notes: Static internal prototype validated. Non-public, static, non-operational. No prototype expansion, public route, sitemap entry, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public tool authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Non-Public Static Workbench Prototype Refinement v1.
claims.notes: Static internal prototype refined. Only index.html and prototype.css modified. No new files, public route, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public tool created.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Non-Public Static Workbench Prototype Refinement Validation v1.
claims.notes: Refined static internal prototype validated as current baseline. No prototype expansion, public route, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public tool authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Non-Public Static Workbench Visual System Hardening v1.
claims.notes: Visual system hardening strengthens internal static prototype identity. No public route, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public tool authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Non-Public Static Workbench Visual System Hardening Validation v1.
claims.notes: Visual system hardening validated as eligible for baseline lock. No prototype file modification, public route, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public tool authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Non-Public Static Workbench Visual System Baseline Lock v1.
claims.notes: Baseline lock adopted for the internal static workbench visual system. No prototype modification, public route, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public tool authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Non-Public Static Workbench Visual System Baseline Lock Validation v1.
claims.notes: Baseline lock validation confirms the locked internal static visual baseline remains change-controlled, publicly isolated, static-only, and non-operational. No public route, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, or public tool authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Non-Public Static Workbench Public-Readiness Boundary Governance v1.
claims.notes: Public-readiness boundary governance defines prerequisites, risks, route blockers, and non-authorization rules. It does not authorize public route, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, or public tool behavior.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Non-Public Static Workbench Public-Readiness Boundary Governance Validation v1.
claims.notes: Public-readiness boundary governance validation confirms prerequisites, non-authorization, public isolation, and static safety. It does not authorize public route, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, or public tool behavior.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Route Eligibility Governance v1.
claims.notes: Public route eligibility governance defines criteria, prerequisites, state model, and non-authorization rules. It does not authorize public route creation, sitemap expansion, public navigation, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, or public release.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Route Eligibility Governance Validation v1.
claims.notes: Public route eligibility governance validation confirms criteria, prerequisites, non-authorization, state model, public isolation, and static safety. It does not authorize public route creation, sitemap expansion, public navigation, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, or public release.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Route Candidate Assessment Governance v1.
claims.notes: Public route candidate assessment governance defines assessment framework, record template, state model, prohibited candidates, and non-authorization rules. It does not assess any specific candidate, create a route, sitemap entry, public navigation, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, or public release.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Route Candidate Assessment Governance Validation v1.
claims.notes: Public route candidate assessment governance validation confirms framework, record template, state model, prohibited candidates, non-authorization, public isolation, and static safety. It does not assess any specific candidate, instantiate a record, create a route, sitemap entry, public navigation, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, or public release.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Route Candidate Registry Governance v1.
claims.notes: Public route candidate registry governance defines registry schema, entry template, state model, entry requirements, and non-authorization rules. It does not register any candidate, assess a candidate, create a route, sitemap entry, public navigation, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, or public release.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Route Candidate Registry Governance Validation v1.
claims.notes: Public route candidate registry governance validation confirms schema, entry template, state model, entry requirements, non-authorization, public isolation, and static safety. It does not register any candidate, create a populated registry, assess a candidate, create a route, sitemap entry, public navigation, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, or public release.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Route Candidate Registration Governance v1.
claims.notes: Public route candidate registration governance defines registration process, eligibility gate, record template, state model, and non-authorization rules. It does not register any candidate, create a candidate entry, assess a candidate, create a route, sitemap entry, public navigation, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, or public release.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Route Candidate Registration Governance Validation v1.
claims.notes: Public route candidate registration governance validation confirms Sprint 50 registration governance integrity without registering any candidate, creating a candidate entry, instantiating a registration record, assessing a candidate, creating a route, sitemap entry, public navigation, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, or public release.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Governance Scaffolding Freeze and Public Reference Production Mandate v1.
claims.notes: Governance scaffolding freeze adopted. Meta-governance frozen until 10 additional public reference pages are produced. Next phase is public reference production. No public route, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, or public tool authorized by this decision.
